model_scope: Non-dispersive control materials for geometry/time-label validation. These are not final site-calibrated inversions.
notes: The measured wet-clay working value epsilon_r≈11.2 is retained in the moderate set.

The historical sigma=0.006 S/m value is deliberately reserved for a later deep-attenuation challenge family; using it in all controls would make a 14 m reflector nearly invisible and would confound geometry validation.
Each material must later be varied within independent scene families; no Line9 label geometry or time distribution is used here.
